summary: Completed frontend testing of Tax Planning Calendar and Mobile Navigation features. All new features are working correctly. Tax Calendar page displays Australian tax dates with calendar view, upcoming events, and all events tabs. Add Event modal works for creating custom events stored in localStorage. Mobile bottom navigation bar with 5 quick access icons is implemented correctly. Mobile slide-out hamburger menu works with swipe gesture support.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge (z-index: 9999) overlaps bottom navigation bar (z-index: 40), blocking clicks on middle nav items (Calendar, Budget, Reports). This is a platform-level badge issue, not app code issue. The bottom nav implementation is correct.
design_issues.note: Platform badge issue - not actionable by main agent

passed_tests: Tax Calendar page (/tax-calendar) loads correctly on desktop
Tax Calendar page - 4 summary cards (Overdue, Next 7 Days, This Month, Custom Events)
Tax Calendar page - 3 tabs (Calendar, Upcoming, All Events) work correctly
Tax Calendar page - Calendar navigation (prev/next month, Today button) works
Tax Calendar page - Calendar grid displays days with event indicators
Tax Calendar page - Add Event button opens modal
Tax Calendar page - Add Event modal has all fields (Title, Date, Category, Description)
Tax Calendar page - Custom event creation works and saves to localStorage
Tax Calendar page - Custom event appears on calendar and in Upcoming Deadlines
Tax Calendar page - Upcoming tab shows Overdue Items, Next 7 Days, Next 30 Days sections
Tax Calendar page - All Events tab shows 25 Australian tax events with category filters
Tax Calendar page - Category filter buttons (All, BAS, Super, PAYG, Tax Return, FBT, Important, CGT, Custom) work
Desktop sidebar - Tax Calendar link present and navigates correctly
Desktop sidebar - Collapse/expand functionality works
Mobile viewport - Mobile header with hamburger menu visible
Mobile viewport - Bottom navigation bar with 5 icons (Home, Advice, Calendar, Budget, Reports) visible
Mobile viewport - Bottom nav icons have correct data-testid attributes
Mobile viewport - Bottom nav highlights active page correctly
Mobile viewport - Hamburger menu opens slide-out navigation with all nav links
Mobile viewport - Tax Calendar page responsive layout (2x2 grid for summary cards)
Mobile viewport - Budget page responsive layout works
Mobile viewport - Reports page responsive layout works
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - Tax calendar uses pre-defined Australian tax dates and localStorage for custom events
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features tested and working: 1) Tax Planning Calendar at /tax-calendar with Australian tax dates (BAS, Super, PAYG, FBT, Tax Returns), calendar view with month navigation, upcoming events view, all events view with category filters, and custom event creation stored in localStorage. 2) Mobile navigation with bottom nav bar (5 icons: Home, Advice, Calendar, Budget, Reports) and slide-out hamburger menu with swipe gesture support. Note: Platform 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps bottom nav on mobile but this is not an app code issue.
